prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `f8be4b64`.
codex_response:
Implemented the ARC2 task package for `f8be4b64`. The rule is: find each non-green center surrounded orthogonally by green arms, extend its color horizontally first and vertically second, stop each ray at the first non-own green arm encountered, and leave plain plus-center columns as holes in the horizontal lines. The summary hint was used; it matched the official examples, so I did not add `notes.md`. No new primitive was needed.

Official verification passed `5/5`, the shared builder produced 1000 verified examples, and I visually checked `[preview_01.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/f8be4b64/previews/preview_01.png)` after tightening the placement distribution to keep the pluses in-family.
